title: 16cm White Ceramic LED Christmas House Ornament | Light Up Christmas Village House Night Light Decoration - Design Varies One Supplied
features: CERAMIC LED HOUSE | This pretty LED ceramic house has a lovely festive feel, at night when the lights dim, it creates a lovely extra glowing dimension as the LED light filters through the windows. Please note: design varies one LED house will be selected and sent at random
CHRISTMAS VILLAGE HOUSE | Ideal for windowsills and mantelpieces and perfect for creating an atmospheric glow in any room, this charming LED house makes a delightful decoration for the winter season

LED CHRISTMAS HOUSE ORNAMENT | Simply designed but very striking when use, why not purchase few and create your own light up Christmas village? A timeless Christmas decoration that you can bring out again and again, year after year
LIGHT UP CERAMIC HOUSE | These light up Christmas houses also make charming little Christmas stocking filler or secret Santa gifts
LED WHITE CHRISTMAS HOUSE | Easy to use and powered by 2 x LR44 batteries (included) and controlled with an ON/OFF switch on the base. No socket needed - flexible, portable. CE Certified
